title: Impact of Unenhanced Computed Tomography (CT) in Elderly Patients Admitted to the Emergency Department With Acute Abdominal Pain
text:
Summary: The purpose of this study is to determine whether non-contrast abdominal computed tomography (CT) impacts management (diagnosis, need for surgery and treatment) in elderly patients admitted to the emergency department with abdominal pain.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Elderly patients admitted to the emergency department (aged 75 year old and older) 

 acute abdominal pain 

 informed consent 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 traumatic pain 

 symptom duration of more than a week 

 unability for the patient to give informed consent
